title: Dirk Vanulden
compiled_truth: Dirk Vanulden is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-07 to 2001-07-30), Dirk Vanulden sent 13 and received 437 emails, totalling 450 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (12), [Rob Cone](people/rob-cone) (9), [Richard Crevelt](people/richard-crevelt) (7), [Dicks](people/dicks-csufresno) (5), [Geoff Pollard](people/geoff-pollard) (5).
